title: derris timorensis
intro: Derris timorensis, also known as the East Timorese derris or timorensis derris, is a plant species native to the island of Timor in Southeast Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloid compounds, which have been shown to exhibit health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Derris timorensis is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
